scope: Calculate return on investment, net gain, payback period, and compound annualized ROI for a single-project screening case.

decision_context.system_boundary: Return on Investment Calculator evaluates one controlled capital-screening boundary inside Quote & SME Finance and excludes broad ERP, portfolio, or multi-project optimization workflows.
decision_context.single_operation_scope: Calculate and evaluate return on investment using user-verified investment cost, total return, annual net benefit, and hurdle rate.
decision_context.decision_owner: operator, engineer, owner_cfo, or checker_auditor depending on selected profile mode
decision_context.decision_after_output: Decide whether to proceed, hold, revise, reject, or escalate the capital project based on ROI, payback, and annualized ROI screening metrics.
decision_context.cost_of_wrong_decision: Wrong machine investment payback calculator result can cause rework, wrong quote, missed capacity, unsafe screening confidence, downtime, cash leakage, or unnecessary escalation.
decision_context.failure_mode_if_formula_wrong: False PASS, false REPRICE, false HOLD, hidden evidence gap, wrong unit conversion, or public formula leakage.
required_source_documents: user-verified source evidence for critical inputs
measurement or quotation record when available
calibration or uncertainty note when measured values are used
excluded_use_cases: replacement for official tax or regulatory advice
field_use_limitations: Exact acceptance limits must come from user-verified project, asset, standard, material, tax, or commercial source.
Public output must not expose internal formula expressions.

irreversible_commitment_metric.description: Machine Investment Payback Calculator should not create an irreversible purchase, quote, production, safety, or capital commitment without source verification and review when thresholds are crossed.

standards.role: Single-currency cash-flow entry without FX conversion

calculation_basis.calculation_character: Protected server-side ROI kernel: computes ROI from net gain over investment cost, simple payback when annual net benefit is positive, and compound annualized ROI over the stated horizon.

unit_conversion_contract.currency_policy: No currency conversion — user provides single-currency values

derating_contract.policy: No automatic derating for free screening tools.

formulas.name: Return on investment from net gain over investment cost
assumptions: Single-period total return versus investment cost
No discount-rate adjustment in the free screening model
edge_cases: Negative net gain yields negative ROI
formulas.public_proof_summary: ROI is computed server-side as net gain divided by investment cost, multiplied by 100.
formulas.protected_methodology_summary: Formula execution remains server-only and is not exposed in public UI.
formulas.checker_note: Verify investment cost and total return use the same currency basis.
formulas.validation_notes: Non-finite inputs are blocked before execution.
formulas.calculation_assumptions: Uses Big.js decimal arithmetic for ROI and net gain.

formulas.name: Simple payback period from annual net benefit
assumptions: Linear recovery from constant annual net benefit
edge_cases: Output omitted when annual net benefit is zero
formulas.public_proof_summary: Payback is reported only when annual net benefit is positive.
formulas.checker_note: Compare payback against policy limits separately from ROI.
formulas.validation_notes: Output omitted when annual net benefit is zero.
formulas.calculation_assumptions: Uses Big.js division for payback timing.

formulas.name: Compound annualized ROI over the stated horizon
assumptions: Geometric mean annualization from total ROI over the horizon
limitations: Not equivalent to discount-rate-based IRR or NPV
edge_cases: Extremely negative ROI may block compound annualization
formulas.public_proof_summary: Compound annualized ROI uses geometric mean annualization over the stated horizon.
formulas.checker_note: Disclose compound versus simple linear annualization when reporting.
formulas.validation_notes: Compound annualized ROI uses fractional exponent conversion at the presentation boundary.
formulas.calculation_assumptions: Core ROI uses Big.js; compound annualization uses a bounded numeric exponent step.

outputs.name: Return on Investment (%)
outputs.public_explanation: Primary ROI decision metric for the project against the stated hurdle rate.
outputs.operator_explanation: Compare ROI to the hurdle rate when deciding whether to proceed.
outputs.engineer_explanation: Review return assumptions and cost basis before approval.
outputs.owner_cfo_explanation: Use ROI versus hurdle rate as the primary accept/reject screening signal.
outputs.checker_explanation: Verify investment cost and total return evidence before accepting the result.

outputs.name: Net Gain
outputs.public_explanation: Total return minus investment cost for the selected project boundary.
outputs.operator_explanation: Shows absolute gain or loss behind the ROI percentage.
outputs.engineer_explanation: Confirm salvage value and operating benefits are included in total return.
outputs.owner_cfo_explanation: Absolute gain indicator supporting ROI screening.
outputs.checker_explanation: Verify net gain build-up from approved business-case evidence.

outputs.name: Payback Period (Years)
outputs.public_explanation: Simple payback period when annual net benefit is positive.
outputs.engineer_explanation: Compare against policy payback limits separately from ROI.

outputs.name: Annualized ROI (%)
outputs.public_explanation: Compound annualized ROI over the stated horizon.
outputs.operator_explanation: Useful when comparing projects with different horizons.
outputs.engineer_explanation: Not equivalent to IRR or discount-rate-based annual return.
outputs.owner_cfo_explanation: Secondary annualization metric with explicit compound assumption.
outputs.checker_explanation: Disclose compound versus simple linear annualization.

outputs.name: Decision State
outputs.public_explanation: PASS when ROI exceeds the hurdle rate, REVIEW when equal, REJECT when below.
outputs.operator_explanation: Follow the suggested action based on the decision state.
outputs.engineer_explanation: Decision state reflects ROI versus the stated hurdle rate.
outputs.owner_cfo_explanation: Use the decision state to guide next actions.
outputs.checker_explanation: Verify the decision state logic against your approval policy.

business_impact_contract.description: Business impact analysis not available for free screening tools.

uncertainty_model.description: No uncertainty propagation for free screening tools.
